requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and IEC 61000 EMC Evidence

summary.en: Lebanon has no confirmed central national EV charging back-office comparable to some Gulf utility platforms. For networked public or commercial chargers, OCPP interoperability should be treated as a project, CPO, fleet, payment, roaming, or site-owner requirement. EMC evidence should be prepared against IEC 61000-family requirements and the EVSE EMC clauses referenced by IEC 61851-related standards. In Lebanon's weak-grid and private-generation context, EMC and power-quality evidence is especially relevant for chargers operating beside PV inverters, battery systems, generators, telecom equipment, payment terminals, and building electrical systems.
summary.zh: 未能确认黎巴嫩存在类似部分海湾公用事业平台的全国集中式电动汽车充电后台。对于联网公共或商业充电桩，应将OCPP互操作视为项目、充电点运营商、车队、支付、漫游或场地方要求。EMC证据应依据IEC 61000系列要求以及IEC 61851相关标准引用的EVSE EMC条款准备。在黎巴嫩弱电网和私人发电背景下，EMC和电能质量证据对与光伏逆变器、电池系统、发电机、通信设备、支付终端和建筑电气系统共同运行的充电桩尤其重要。
summary.zht: 未能確認黎巴嫩存在類似部分海灣公用事業平台的全國集中式電動汽車充電後台。對於聯網公共或商業充電樁，應將OCPP互操作視為項目、充電點運營商、車隊、支付、漫遊或場地方要求。EMC證據應依據IEC 61000系列要求以及IEC 61851相關標準引用的EVSE EMC條款準備。在黎巴嫩弱電網和私人發電背景下，EMC和電能品質證據對與光伏逆變器、電池系統、發電機、通訊設備、支付終端和建築電氣系統共同運行的充電樁尤其重要。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems
OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked charger back-office integration where required by project
Project owner, CPO, fleet, payment, roaming, and insurer interoperability requirements

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS, while back-office communication can be proprietary or OCPP depending on the operator. China EMC evidence may be based on GB/T implementations and domestic test scopes. Those files do not automatically satisfy an IEC 61000 evidence package, OCPP conformance expectations, or Lebanon project-owner requirements.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信，后台通信则可能因运营商不同采用私有协议或OCPP。中国EMC证据可能基于GB/T实施和国内测试范围。这些文件不会自动满足IEC 61000证据包、OCPP符合性预期或黎巴嫩项目业主要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊，後台通訊則可能因運營商不同採用私有協議或OCPP。中國EMC證據可能基於GB/T實施和國內測試範圍。這些文件不會自動滿足IEC 61000證據包、OCPP符合性預期或黎巴嫩項目業主要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China domestic EMC standards and operator-specific back-office protocols

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, backend, SIM / network requirements, payment integration, cybersecurity expectations, and commissioning tests required by the Lebanese CPO, fleet, or site owner. They should also prepare IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 EMC reports, harmonic / power-quality data, and coexistence notes for solar-plus-battery or generator-backed sites. A charger with only GB/T 27930 vehicle communication and no project-required OCPP backend cannot be assumed ready for networked Lebanon deployments.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认黎巴嫩充电点运营商、车队或场地方要求的OCPP版本、后台、SIM/网络要求、支付集成、网络安全预期和调试测试。还应准备IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 EMC报告、谐波/电能质量数据，以及太阳能加电池或发电机备用场站的共存说明。仅支持GB/T 27930车辆通信且没有项目所需OCPP后台的充电桩，不能假定可用于黎巴嫩联网部署。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認黎巴嫩充電點運營商、車隊或場地方要求的OCPP版本、後台、SIM/網絡要求、支付集成、網絡安全預期和調試測試。還應準備IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 EMC報告、諧波/電能品質數據，以及太陽能加電池或發電機備用場站的共存說明。僅支持GB/T 27930車輛通訊且沒有項目所需OCPP後台的充電樁，不能假定可用於黎巴嫩聯網部署。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — OCPP is mandatory when required by the CPO, fleet, site owner, payment / roaming platform, or tender; IEC EMC evidence is expected for professional conformity, safety, and importer due diligence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle communication and is not an OCPP back-office substitute; China EMC files require IEC mapping

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Lebanon, OCPP is usually a project interoperability gate rather than a confirmed national platform mandate. EMC evidence should be IEC-based, especially for chargers operating with PV, batteries, or generators. GB/T 27930 vehicle communication does not replace OCPP back-office integration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对黎巴嫩而言，OCPP通常是项目互操作门槛，而非已确认的全国平台强制要求。EMC证据应基于IEC体系，尤其适用于与光伏、电池或发电机共同运行的充电桩。GB/T 27930车辆通信不能替代OCPP后台集成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對黎巴嫩而言，OCPP通常是項目互操作門檻，而非已確認的全國平台強制要求。EMC證據應基於IEC體系，尤其適用於與光伏、電池或發電機共同運行的充電樁。GB/T 27930車輛通訊不能替代OCPP後台集成。
